Title: Initialize project and base Express config
Description: Set up a Node.js project and basic Express server. Steps: npm init -y; install express and nodemon; add scripts { start: "node server.js", dev: "nodemon server.js" }; create server.js to listen on port 7995; enable express.json(); serve static files from ./public; verify GET /health returns 200.
Success criteria: Running npm run dev starts Express on http://localhost:7995 and /health returns 200; public/ is served.
No explicit dependencies.
